De La Soul - Cabin in the Sky
Oneohtrix Point Never - Tranquilizer
miffle - goodbye, world!
Gabriel Jacoby - gutta child (EP)

Danny Brown - Stardust
Mon Laferte - FEMME FATALE
Hannah Frances - Nested in Tangles
Gaby Amarantos - Rock Doido

Geese - Getting Killed
The Hives - The Hives Forever Forever The Hives
Guerilla Toss - You're Weird Now
Maruja - Pain to Power
Ho99o9 - Tomorrow We Escape
Nourished by Time - The Passionate Ones
Earl Sweatshirt - Live Laugh Love
Ninajirachi - I Love My Computer
JID - God Does Like Ugly
Tyler Childers - Snipe Hunter
Quadeca - Vanisher, Horizon Scraper
SUMAC and Moor Mother - The Film
Tyler, the Creator - DON'T TAP THE GLASS
Clipse - Let God Sort Em Out
Tropical Fuck Storm - Fairyland Codex
Aesop Rock - Black Hole Superette
McKinley Dixon - Magic, Alive!
Little Simz - Lotus
Miley Cyrus - Something Beautiful
Honningbarna - Soft Spot
Model/Actriz - Pirouette
Deerhoof - Noble and Godlike in Ruin
Natalia Lafourcade - Cancionera
Viagra Boys - viagr aboys
Infinity Knives & Brian Ennals - A City Drowned in God's Black Tears
Backxwash - Only Dust Remains
Bon Iver - SABLE, fABLE
Jane Remover - Revengeseekerz
Black Country, New Road - Forever Howlong
Deafheaven - Lonely People with Power
SPELLLING - Portrait of My Heart
Imperial Triumphant - Goldstar
Paris Texas - They Left Me with the Sword & They Left Me with a Gun (EPs)
Panda Bear - Sinister Grift
Horsegirl - Phonetics On and On

FKA twigs - EUSEXUA
Prostitute - Attempted Martyr (2024)
Bad Bunny - DeBÍ TiRAR MáS FOToS
